ddt:Target.Name: NFA2 V1.3
ddt:Target.Description:
NFA2.0
V1.2: 21/05/10 [L. GERVAIS] Minor changes
V1.1: 04/05/10 [L. GERVAIS] Addition of startup screens Addition of auto identification information (RC7)
V1.0: 12/04/10 [L. GERVAIS] Addition of hardware reset in write button scenario of configuration screen
V0.8: 09/04/10 [L. GERVAIS]
Introduction of new features (0.7) in configuration screens
V0.7: 15/09/2009 [L. GERVAIS] Database for NFA2.0.
Introduction of GSM diagnostic features: 2 new DTC: $9302 and $9381 Datawrite GSM connectivity capability Datawrite DataWrite.GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition Data: Connectivity GSM antenna OL diagnostic inhibition GSM antenna SCS diagnostic inhibition GSM antenna SCG diagnostic inhibition
V0.6: 15/09/2009 Applicable specifications: - NFA_DiagnosticRequirements v0.9 - NFA_DiagnosticServicesImplementation v1.3 based on DCR-F4 NFA519 (New Renault startup screens) for NFA1.1. Data: car maker updated with new Renault IDs. Auto-identification: NFA1.0 KZ1 (2017 2828), KZ2 (2017 2121) and KZ3 (2017 2E2E) identifications added. Officialisation date updated.
V0.5: 26/08/2008: Added auto ident Added soft reset Updated screens
V0.4: 15 juillet 2008: added part ref and kit assembly reading, updated DTC definitions. added auto-ident for FF1
V0.3 06 juin 2008, corrected screen scenarii, modified output controls
V0.2 28 mai 2008, MAJ paramètres de configuration et autoidentification.
V0.1 11 fevrier 2008, Création
Naïké DURAND SII Plateau intégration e/e tél: 01768 56859 naike.durand-renexter@renault.com

Data.Name: ECUR: reset type (R)
Data.Comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

Data.Name: ECUR: reset type (S)
Data.Comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

Data.Name: LID: VIN: V.I.N.
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: LID: VIN: C.R.C.
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: Session Name
Data.Comment: type of diagnostic session to be activated

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: RDBLID: CANMMUX: Rear Cam counter
Data.Comment: Rear Camera ECU fault counter (0 expected)

Item.Text: Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39

Data.Name: Kit AssemblyReference
Data.Comment: Kit assembly reference (identical to part number)

Data.Name: Connectivity
Data.Comment: Configuration of the activation of Connectivity

Item.Text: Device capable but no GSM antenna connected

Data.Name: GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCS diagnostic inhibition
Data.Comment: Configuration of the diagnostic of GSM antenna

Data.Name: GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCG diagnostic inhibition
Data.Comment: Configuration of the diagnostic of GSM antenna

Data.Name: GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna OL diagnostic inhibition
Data.Comment: Configuration of the diagnostic of GSM antenna

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: StartAfterSalesSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

DataItem.Name: GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCS diagnostic inhibition
GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCG diagnostic inhibition
GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna OL diagnostic inhibition
GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna OL diagnostic inhibition
GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCG diagnostic inhibition
GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCS diagnostic inhibition

Test.Description: configuration incomplète ou non prise en compte

Input.DataName: GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCS diagnostic inhibition
GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCG diagnostic inhibition
GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna OL diagnostic inhibition

Display.DataName: GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCS diagnostic inhibition
GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna SCG diagnostic inhibition
GSM antenna diagnostic inhibition.GSM antenna OL diagnostic inhibition
